task.title: Refactor mount syncer to event-driven local changes

events.content: Introduced fsnotify-driven local writes via Syncer.HandleLocalChange: Introduced fsnotify-driven local writes via Syncer.HandleLocalChange

raw.question: Introduced fsnotify-driven local writes via Syncer.HandleLocalChange
raw.chosen: Introduced fsnotify-driven local writes via Syncer.HandleLocalChange
raw.reasoning: Keeps local edits immediately pushed without waiting for periodic poll cycles

events.content: Kept 30-second polling fallback using Reconcile and added Watcher loop: Kept 30-second polling fallback using Reconcile and added Watcher loop

raw.question: Kept 30-second polling fallback using Reconcile and added Watcher loop
raw.chosen: Kept 30-second polling fallback using Reconcile and added Watcher loop
raw.reasoning: Maintains conflict recovery and catches missed fsnotify events while avoiding busy polling
